question: Will the Western Conference beat the Eastern Conference in the 2026 NBA Finals?
textDescription:
Resolution criteria

This market resolves to YES if the team representing the Western Conference wins the 2026 NBA Finals. It resolves to NO if the team representing the Eastern Conference wins.

The outcome will be determined by the official results of the 2026 NBA Finals, as reported by NBA.com. If the 2026 NBA Finals are not completed, cancelled, or if the season is otherwise abandoned before a champion is crowned, this market will resolve to N/A.

Background

The NBA Finals is the annual championship series for the National Basketball Association. The series is played between the winners of the Eastern Conference and the Western Conference. The 2026 NBA Finals are scheduled to take place in June 2026, marking the culmination of the 2025-2026 NBA season. Historically, the Western and Eastern Conferences compete for the Larry O'Brien Championship Trophy in a best-of-seven series.
